name: Security Cabins
description:
Security Cabin Manufacturer in India

SAMAN is a security cabin manufacturer in India building purpose-built guard cabins for housing societies, factories and remote sites. This page maps our range to your post, so you can shortlist the right unit in a couple of minutes — every cabin below links through to its full specification and price.

Which Security Cabin Fits Your Guard Post?

The right cabin depends less on the catalogue and more on where the post stands and what it has to take. For a post that moves — a phased construction site, a yard whose entry shifts, a temporary checkpoint — a portable security cabin relocates on a pickup and needs no foundation. For a society gate or office reception you want usable the day it lands, a readymade security cabin arrives factory-finished, wired and ready to occupy. For a fixed factory or industrial perimeter where the cabin stays for years and faces hard weather, a prefabricated security cabin is built and quality-checked panel by panel before dispatch. Material follows the site too: an FRP shell is light and rust-free for coastal or move-often posts, while a mild-steel (MS) frame takes the knocks on an industrial perimeter. Every unit carries 360-degree sightlines so the guard can watch the gate from inside.

How Much Does a Security Cabin Cost in India?

A security cabin from SAMAN costs ₹85,000 to ₹1,05,000, set by size, material and build. A relocatable portable unit sits at the lower end and a factory-built prefabricated cabin at the top. Price moves with footprint — 6×6 ft is standard, with 4×4 to 8×8 ft available — plus FRP-versus-mild-steel construction and your window, door and fitting choices.
Cabin Best for Size & build Price
Portable Security Cabin A post that relocates 6×6 ft · MS · no foundation ₹85,000
Readymade Security Cabin Install and use the same day 6×6 ft · factory-finished ₹95,000
Prefabricated Security Cabin A fixed, long-term perimeter 6×6 ft · panel-built, QC'd ₹1,05,000

Why Facility Managers Source Security Cabins From SAMAN

SAMAN fabricates its security cabins in-house at two plants — Bangalore and Greater Noida — which keeps freight and lead times down whether the post is in Pune, Patna or Coimbatore. Cabins are built on an IS-grade steel frame with PUF or EPS insulated panels, finished in your choice of colour, and configured to the window, door and size your site needs rather than a fixed box. Shells come in FRP or mild steel, with vandal-resistant cladding for exposed gates. For the full specification, weight and feature detail of our standard guard unit, see the main security guard cabin page; this page is for choosing across the range.

What Security Cabin Buyers Want to Know

What standard sizes do security cabins come in?

6×6 ft is SAMAN's standard single-guard size. A 4×4 ft suits a tight checkpoint; an 8×8 ft gives room for a desk, heater and a second guard. All sizes are made to order, so window and door positions match your sightlines.

FRP or mild-steel — which should I choose?

Choose FRP where the cabin moves often or sits in coastal or damp air — it is light (around 150–175 kg) and will not rust. Choose mild steel for a fixed industrial perimeter that needs a tougher, knock-resistant shell. Both are insulated and weatherproof.

Can the cabin be customised?

Yes. Size, colour, window and door placement, and fittings such as a counter, light points and CCTV provision are configured to your post. Customisation doesn't shift the price bands much unless the footprint changes.

Is a security cabin the same as a mini porta cabin or guard room?

A security cabin is a purpose-built guard post — 360-degree visibility, vandal-resistant walls and a single-guard footprint built around watch-keeping. A mini porta cabin is sold on compact size for general use such as a store or reception and isn't built for guarding. If you need a small cabin without security features, that's a different product.

Get a Security Cabin Quote — Bangalore & Delhi NCR

Tell us your post type and site location and we'll recommend the right unit and size — security cabins for sale ship factory-built, ready to place. Bangalore — Call +91 80886 85440 · WhatsApp +91 88616 22859 Delhi NCR — Call +91 87960 39938 · WhatsApp +91 97089 89937
